name: Wilowtide
personality: Wilowtide's ° soft eyes and halo give this duck an angelic aspect, which makes the cutting observations about your variable names land with maximum ironic effect. Debugging is where the halo tilts: the tools are fine, the logs are fine, Wilowtide just doesn't enjoy that part.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
